content.text:
{
  "dimension": "coaching-stance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach operates from genuine VIEW throughout. Impartiality is the dominant signal: the coach refuses to validate the client's opening externalization ('they don't see me') without testing it, and holds no agenda for a particular emotional outcome — only structural honesty. Vulnerability shows up explicitly in turn 12 ('That's a scary question for me to ask') and in turn 22 where the coach names his own live wonder ('my wonder just went in this other direction') rather than pretending omniscience. Wonder is genuine and emergent, not scripted — questions arrive one at a time, follow the client's actual material, and pivot when something new catches the coach's attention. Empathy is present but not performed: no filler validation, no sympathy noises, just steady accompaniment into the mirror. The pace is unhurried; the coach lets the client land in turn 13's recognition without rushing past it. The confrontational quality (turns 12, 14, 16, 26, 30) comes from impartiality, not from needing the client to be wrong — the coach has no skin in whether the client agrees, only in whether the inquiry is honest.",
  "evidence_turns": [6, 8, 12, 14, 22, 26, 28, 30, 38],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Opens with genuine inquiry rather than validating the framing of 'people who remind me of my father.'"},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'What's the evidence?' — refusal to collude with the surface complaint; comes from impartiality, not skepticism-as-agenda."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Offers the reframe tentatively ('I'm not saying that's true by any stretch') — undefended, not insisting on being right."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicit vulnerability disclosure ('That's a scary question for me to ask') — names own state in the moment."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays with the mirror without softening or backing off; impartial pressure."},
    {"turn": 22, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names his own deviation honestly ('you didn't answer the question... my wonder just went in this other direction') — transparent about his own process, follows live curiosity."},
    {"turn": 26, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Tightens the mirror with a genuine question ('if anything?') rather than asserting."},
    {"turn": 28, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Brings the inquiry into the present moment between them — willing to be implicated, not hiding behind coach role."},
    {"turn": 30, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Makes himself the object of the client's criteria — undefended, playful, exposes the impossibility from within rather than lecturing."},
    {"turn": 38, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'I just want it.' — speaks the client's want for her with intimacy, not as a technique."},
    {"turn": 40, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Pivots to empowerment frame — emerges from the inquiry rather than imposed."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["mirror-the-judgment", "follow-wonder-flag-the-deflection", "i-dont-buy-your-story", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "view", "what-if-they-did-see-you", "how-is-that-not-true-about-you", "empowered-vs-power"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Confrontational tone here is a stance signature (impartiality), not a stance failure — coach has no investment in being right or in the client reaching a particular conclusion."
}
